---
title: "Data Structures & Algorithms"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@300;400;600;700;900&family=Instrument+Sans:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,600;1,400&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<style>
:root{--ac:#ef4444;--ac-rgb:239,68,68;--bg:#07070b;--surface:#0e0e14;--card:#13131a;--card-h:#18181f;--border:rgba(255,255,255,.07);--border-h:rgba(255,255,255,.14);--t1:#f0eee8;--t2:#8a8a9a;--t3:#45454f;--fn-head:'Outfit',sans-serif;--fn-body:'Instrument Sans',sans-serif;--fn-mono:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;--r:12px}
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
body{background:var(--bg)!important;font-family:var(--fn-body);color:var(--t1)}
#quarto-content{padding:0!important;max-width:100%!important}nav.navbar,footer,.quarto-title-banner{display:none!important}a{text-decoration:none}
.page{overflow-x:hidden}
.c-hero{min-height:85vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;padding:clamp(5rem,10vw,8rem) clamp(1.5rem,7vw,7rem) clamp(3rem,5vw,4rem);position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 60% at 10% 50%,rgba(var(--ac-rgb),.07) 0%,transparent 70%),var(--bg)}
.c-hero::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;background-image:linear-gradient(var(--border) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,var(--border) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:48px 48px;mask-image:radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 80% at 0% 50%,black 0%,transparent 70%)}
.c-kicker{font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.68rem;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ac);margin-bottom:1.5rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem;position:relative;z-index:2}.c-kicker::before{content:'';width:22px;height:1.5px;background:var(--ac)}
.c-h1{font-family:var(--fn-head)!important;font-size:clamp(3rem,7vw,6rem)!important;font-weight:900!important;line-height:.97!important;color:var(--t1)!important;letter-spacing:-.03em;margin-bottom:.4em!important;max-width:16ch;position:relative;z-index:2}
.hi{color:var(--ac)}.it{font-style:italic;color:var(--t2)}
.c-desc{font-family:var(--fn-body);font-size:clamp(.95rem,1.5vw,1.08rem);color:var(--t2);line-height:1.75;max-width:50ch;margin-bottom:2rem;position:relative;z-index:2}
.c-meta{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.8rem;margin-bottom:2.8rem;position:relative;z-index:2}
.c-chip{font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.64rem;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--t2);background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);border:1px solid var(--border-h);padding:.38rem 1rem;border-radius:100px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem}.c-chip b{color:var(--ac)}
.c-hero-btns{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.9rem;position:relative;z-index:2}
.btn-ac{font-family:var(--fn-head);font-weight:700;font-size:.9rem;color:#07070b!important;background:var(--ac);padding:.95rem 2.3rem;border-radius:6px;transition:all .22s;box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(var(--ac-rgb),.35);display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem}.btn-ac:hover{filter:brightness(1.1);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.btn-ghost{font-family:var(--fn-head);font-weight:600;font-size:.9rem;color:var(--t2)!important;background:transparent;padding:.95rem 2rem;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid var(--border-h);transition:all .22s}.btn-ghost:hover{border-color:var(--ac);color:var(--t1)!important}
.s{padding:clamp(3.5rem,7vw,6rem) clamp(1.5rem,7vw,7rem);max-width:1400px;margin:0 auto}
.s-alt{background:var(--surface);border-top:1px solid var(--border);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.s-lbl{font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.66rem;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ac);margin-bottom:.8rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem}.s-lbl::after{content:'';display:block;height:1px;width:28px;background:var(--ac);opacity:.5}
.s-title{font-family:var(--fn-head)!important;font-size:clamp(1.8rem,3.5vw,2.8rem)!important;font-weight:900!important;color:var(--t1)!important;letter-spacing:-.025em;margin-bottom:.4rem!important;line-height:1.08!important}.s-title em{font-style:italic;color:var(--ac)}
.s-desc{font-family:var(--fn-body);font-size:.97rem;color:var(--t2);max-width:58ch;line-height:1.72;margin-bottom:2.8rem}
/* topic grid */
.tgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(240px,1fr));gap:1.2rem}
.tc{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r);padding:1.6rem;transition:all .25s;cursor:default;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.tc:hover{border-color:var(--ac);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.tc::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:var(--ac);transform:scaleX(0);transform-origin:left;transition:transform .35s}.tc:hover::before{transform:scaleX(1)}
.tc-icon{font-size:1.5rem;margin-bottom:.8rem;display:block}
.tc-name{font-family:var(--fn-head);font-size:.95rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--t1);margin-bottom:.4rem}
.tc-cmp{font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.65rem;color:var(--ac);margin-bottom:.5rem;letter-spacing:.08em}
.tc-desc{font-family:var(--fn-body);font-size:.78rem;color:var(--t2);line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:.7rem}
.pills{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.35rem}
.pill{font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.6rem;color:var(--t3);background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:.18rem .5rem;border-radius:3px;transition:color .2s,border-color .2s}.tc:hover .pill{color:var(--ac);border-color:rgba(var(--ac-rgb),.25)}
/* problem counter */
.counter-strip{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:1px;background:var(--border);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r);overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:3rem}
.ctr{flex:1;min-width:120px;background:var(--card);padding:1.5rem 1.2rem;text-align:center;transition:background .2s}.ctr:hover{background:var(--card-h)}
.ctr-val{font-family:var(--fn-head);font-size:2.2rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--t1);line-height:1;display:block}
.ctr-val span{color:var(--ac)}
.ctr-lbl{font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--t3);margin-top:.3rem;display:block}
.c-cta{text-align:center;padding:clamp(4rem,8vw,6rem) clamp(1.5rem,7vw,7rem);background:var(--surface);border-top:1px solid var(--border);position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.c-cta::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 60% at 50% 100%,rgba(var(--ac-rgb),.06) 0%,transparent 70%)}
.cta-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ac);background:rgba(var(--ac-rgb),.1);border:1px solid rgba(var(--ac-rgb),.25);padding:.35rem 1rem;border-radius:100px;margin-bottom:1.8rem}
.cta-dot{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--ac);animation:pd 2s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes pd{0%,100%{transform:scale(1)}50%{transform:scale(1.6);opacity:.5}}
.c-cta h2{font-family:var(--fn-head)!important;font-size:clamp(2rem,4.5vw,3.2rem)!important;font-weight:900!important;color:var(--t1)!important;letter-spacing:-.025em;margin:0 auto 1rem!important;max-width:22ch;line-height:1.08!important;position:relative;z-index:1}.c-cta h2 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--ac)}
.c-cta p{font-family:var(--fn-body);font-size:1rem;color:var(--t2);max-width:46ch;margin:0 auto 2.5rem;line-height:1.7;position:relative;z-index:1}
.cta-btns{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.9rem;justify-content:center;position:relative;z-index:1}
@media(max-width:640px){.c-hero{padding:4rem 1.5rem 2.5rem}.s{padding:3rem 1.5rem}}
</style>

<div class="page">
<section class="c-hero">
  <div class="c-kicker">Track 04 · CS Fundamentals</div>
  <h1 class="c-h1">DSA:<br><span class="hi">Think</span><br><span class="it">algorithmically.</span></h1>
  <p class="c-desc">100+ carefully selected problems. Every major data structure and algorithmic pattern — from arrays to dynamic programming. Taught in Python and C++. The one course that makes every other skill sharper.</p>
  <div class="c-meta">
    <span class="c-chip">⏱ Duration <b>12 Weeks</b></span>
    <span class="c-chip">👥 Level <b>Intermediate</b></span>
    <span class="c-chip">🧩 Problems <b>100+ Curated</b></span>
    <span class="c-chip">🔑 Prereq <b>Python or C++</b></span>
  </div>
  <div class="c-hero-btns">
    <a href="/contact.qmd" class="btn-ac">Enroll Now →</a>
    <a href="#curriculum" class="btn-ghost">View Curriculum</a>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="s" id="curriculum">
  <div class="s-lbl">Problem Bank</div>
  <h2 class="s-title">100+ Problems, <em>Every Pattern</em></h2>
  <p class="s-desc">Problems are selected to build intuition — not to stress you out. Each concept is taught first, then practised immediately.</p>
  <div class="counter-strip">
    <div class="ctr"><span class="ctr-val">30<span>+</span></span><span class="ctr-lbl">Easy</span></div>
    <div class="ctr"><span class="ctr-val">50<span>+</span></span><span class="ctr-lbl">Medium</span></div>
    <div class="ctr"><span class="ctr-val">20<span>+</span></span><span class="ctr-lbl">Hard</span></div>
    <div class="ctr"><span class="ctr-val">12</span><span class="ctr-lbl">Core Patterns</span></div>
    <div class="ctr"><span class="ctr-val">2</span><span class="ctr-lbl">Languages</span></div>
  </div>

  <div class="tgrid">
    <div class="tc"><span class="tc-icon">📐</span><div class="tc-cmp">O(1) – O(n)</div><div class="tc-name">Arrays &amp; Strings</div><div class="tc-desc">Traversal, two-pointer, sliding window, prefix sums, and string manipulation — the most tested patterns.</div><div class="pills"><span class="pill">Two pointers</span><span class="pill">Sliding window</span><span class="pill">Prefix sum</span></div></div>
    <div class="tc"><span class="tc-icon">🔗</span><div class="tc-cmp">O(n)</div><div class="tc-name">Linked Lists</div><div class="tc-desc">Singly &amp; doubly linked, fast/slow pointers, reversal, cycle detection, and merge operations.</div><div class="pills"><span class="pill">Floyd's algorithm</span><span class="pill">Reversal</span><span class="pill">Merge</span></div></div>
    <div class="tc"><span class="tc-icon">📚</span><div class="tc-cmp">O(n)</div><div class="tc-name">Stacks &amp; Queues</div><div class="tc-desc">Monotonic stack, queue from stacks, priority queues, deque patterns, and expression evaluation.</div><div class="pills"><span class="pill">Monotonic stack</span><span class="pill">Priority queue</span><span class="pill">Deque</span></div></div>
    <div class="tc"><span class="tc-icon">🌲</span><div class="tc-cmp">O(log n) – O(n)</div><div class="tc-name">Trees &amp; BSTs</div><div class="tc-desc">DFS/BFS on trees, in/pre/post-order, LCA, diameter, path sum, and BST operations.</div><div class="pills"><span class="pill">DFS/BFS</span><span class="pill">LCA</span><span class="pill">BST validation</span></div></div>
    <div class="tc"><span class="tc-icon">🕸️</span><div class="tc-cmp">O(V+E)</div><div class="tc-name">Graphs</div><div class="tc-desc">Adjacency list/matrix, BFS, DFS, topological sort, Dijkstra, Union-Find, and cycle detection.</div><div class="pills"><span class="pill">Dijkstra</span><span class="pill">Topo sort</span><span class="pill">Union-Find</span></div></div>
    <div class="tc"><span class="tc-icon">🔄</span><div class="tc-cmp">O(n!) – O(2^n)</div><div class="tc-name">Recursion &amp; Backtracking</div><div class="tc-desc">Subset generation, permutations, N-Queens, Sudoku solver — build recursive intuition step by step.</div><div class="pills"><span class="pill">Subsets</span><span class="pill">Permutations</span><span class="pill">Pruning</span></div></div>
    <div class="tc"><span class="tc-icon">⚡</span><div class="tc-cmp">O(n log n)</div><div class="tc-name">Sorting &amp; Searching</div><div class="tc-desc">Merge sort, quicksort, binary search variants, search in rotated arrays, and k-th element problems.</div><div class="pills"><span class="pill">Binary search</span><span class="pill">Merge sort</span><span class="pill">Quickselect</span></div></div>
    <div class="tc"><span class="tc-icon">💎</span><div class="tc-cmp">O(n²) – O(n·m)</div><div class="tc-name">Dynamic Programming</div><div class="tc-desc">Memoisation vs tabulation, 1D/2D DP, knapsack, LCS, coin change, and interval DP.</div><div class="pills"><span class="pill">Memoisation</span><span class="pill">Knapsack</span><span class="pill">LCS</span></div></div>
    <div class="tc"><span class="tc-icon">🔑</span><div class="tc-cmp">O(1) avg</div><div class="tc-name">Hashing</div><div class="tc-desc">HashMap patterns, frequency counting, anagram detection, and two-sum variations.</div><div class="pills"><span class="pill">Frequency map</span><span class="pill">Two-sum</span><span class="pill">Anagrams</span></div></div>
    <div class="tc"><span class="tc-icon">🌿</span><div class="tc-cmp">O(n log n)</div><div class="tc-name">Greedy Algorithms</div><div class="tc-desc">Interval scheduling, activity selection, Huffman coding, and when greedy is (and isn't) correct.</div><div class="pills"><span class="pill">Interval merging</span><span class="pill">Activity selection</span></div></div>
    <div class="tc"><span class="tc-icon">🔢</span><div class="tc-cmp">O(1)</div><div class="tc-name">Bit Manipulation</div><div class="tc-desc">XOR tricks, bit counting, power of two checks, and bitmask DP for subset problems.</div><div class="pills"><span class="pill">XOR</span><span class="pill">Bitmask</span><span class="pill">Bit counting</span></div></div>
    <div class="tc"><span class="tc-icon">🪟</span><div class="tc-cmp">O(n)</div><div class="tc-name">Sliding Window &amp; Two Pointer</div><div class="tc-desc">Variable and fixed window, longest substring, minimum window substring, and container with most water.</div><div class="pills"><span class="pill">Variable window</span><span class="pill">Longest substring</span></div></div>
  </div>
</div>

<section class="c-cta">
  <div class="cta-badge"><span class="cta-dot"></span>High-Intensity · Open</div>
  <h2>Think faster.<br><em>Code smarter.</em></h2>
  <p>DSA sharpens how you approach every problem. Once you can see patterns, interviews and real engineering both get dramatically easier.</p>
  <div class="cta-btns">
    <a href="/contact.qmd" class="btn-ac">Start Solving →</a>
    <a href="learn.qmd" class="btn-ghost">← All Courses</a>
  </div>
</section>
</div>
```
